name: GPT 5.6 Sol
description: GPT 5.6 Sol is OpenAI's flagship GPT-5.6 model for advanced reasoning, agentic coding, scientific analysis, and complex professional work.

links.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition

details.name: availability
details.value: OpenAI released GPT-5.6 Sol on July 9, 2026 and lists GPT-5.6 as available across ChatGPT, Codex, and the OpenAI API, with rollout continuing globally over the following 24 hours.

details.name: prompt_caching
details.value: Supports explicit cache breakpoints and a 30-minute minimum cache life during preview.

details.name: reasoning_effort
details.value: Supports the new max reasoning effort during preview.

details.name: ultra_mode
details.value: Supports ultra mode for complex work using subagents.

details.name: cerebras_preview
details.value: Cerebras support is planned for July 2026 for select customers, with OpenAI reporting up to 750 tokens per second.

details.name: service_tiers
details.value: Prepared for standard, flex, priority, and batch API service tiers from the July 9, 2026 release date.

details.name: pricing
details.value: Official preview pricing is $5/M input tokens, $0.5/M cached-read input tokens, $6.25/M cache-write input tokens, and $30/M output tokens on standard processing.
